category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/tjko/jpegoptim describes jpegoptim as a utility to optimize/compress JPEG files.
source_facts.description says 'Utility to optimize JPEG files'.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use 'jpegoptim' at https://github.com/tjko/jpegoptim.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains requirements, installation, history, and source links.
Official project page is linked from the repository as the latest-version/homepage surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/tjko/jpegoptim, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes optimize/compress behavior and options for target size, progressive preservation, and marker stripping.
